options.content: The thesis evaluation compares a baseline raw-ingestion gateway against the proposed event-driven edge gateway. The measured result is that proposed mode adds rule-based event intelligence with a small latency overhead while preserving approximately 200 messages per second simulator throughput.

panels.title: Clean high-throughput A/B summary
panels.description: Averages from the three clean A/B repetitions stored in results/ab/high_throughput.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('Baseline', 199.61, 24731.67, 23501.33, 4.11, 5.52, 136.67, 0.00), ('Proposed', 199.60, 24744.33, 23472.33, 4.43, 6.29, 3980.67, 5948.00)) AS t(mode, simulator_msg_s, messages_received_avg, readings_stored_avg, telemetry_avg_ms, telemetry_p99_ms, critical_events_avg, warning_events_avg)

panels.title: Telemetry latency overhead
panels.description: Baseline vs proposed telemetry latency from clean high-throughput A/B averages.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('avg_ms', 4.11, 4.43), ('p95_ms', 4.97, 5.56), ('p99_ms', 5.52, 6.29)) AS t(metric, baseline, proposed)

panels.title: Proposed anomaly detection evidence
panels.description: Event counts from the proposed-mode anomaly detection run.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('OVERLOAD', 'CRITICAL', 284), ('DEVICE_FAILURE', 'CRITICAL', 12), ('POWER_SPIKE', 'WARNING', 430), ('UNDER_VOLTAGE', 'WARNING', 31), ('OVER_VOLTAGE', 'WARNING', 14), ('VOLTAGE_ANOMALY', 'INFO', 31)) AS t(event_type, severity, observed_count) ORDER BY observed_count DESC

panels.title: Current live event evidence
panels.description: Current database event evidence for the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_type, severity, count(*)::int AS events, count(DISTINCT device_id)::int AS affected_devices FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY event_type, severity ORDER BY events DESC, event_type

panels.title: Database size observation
panels.description: Database growth from the clean A/B run. This is a storage-cost observation, not a storage-reduction claim.

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('Baseline', 9.94, 21.84, 11.89), ('Proposed', 9.96, 25.90, 15.94)) AS t(mode, avg_before_mb, avg_after_mb, avg_growth_mb)

options.content: Supported: low-latency MQTT ingestion, rule-based event detection, validation behavior, and observable gateway metrics. Not supported by these tests: ML anomaly detection, storage reduction, certified metering accuracy, long-term production reliability, or hardware-field performance.
